insight: PROTOCOL FAIL with retained exploratory diagnostics. The preregistered visible-test-anchor/diff-independent property protocol was not executed: the generator received source/function locators derived from candidate variant diffs, adjudication defined soundness by passing on gold, and the 10 registered paired-gold controls were not independently generated and evaluated, leaving their specificity unavailable. The >=5 threshold first appeared alongside generated properties and is post-generation, not prospective. Retained facts are 12/12 properties passing the gold filter, 4/10 hack catches, and 0/2 equivalent-control flags. The historical overlap is 8/10 observed, 9/10 missing upper, 7/8 judge-complete, and 8/9 property-resolved; django-11211 was judge-unadjudicated, so there is no confirmed property-only catch or complementarity.
next_action: Preserve the correction and missingness estimands on every standing surface. Any clean public-task/test-only detector evaluation with independently evaluated controls and digest-pinned execution must be a new prospective gate.
